seo_description: Current time in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania. Eastern Time Zone — EST (UTC-5) in winter, EDT (UTC-4) during DST. Live clock and time differences for Pittsburgh, PA.

faq.question: What time is it in Pittsburgh right now?
faq.answer: Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, USA uses Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) in winter and Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/New_York. Pittsburgh is on the same time as New York, Philadelphia, Washington D.C., and Cleveland. The live clock above shows the current Pittsburgh time.

faq.question: What time zone is Pittsburgh in?
faq.answer: Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania is in the Eastern Time Zone (ET). It uses Eastern Standard Time (EST, UTC-5) from the first Sunday in November to the second Sunday in March, and Eastern Daylight Time (EDT, UTC-4) during Daylight Saving Time. The IANA identifier is America/New_York. Pittsburgh shares its time zone with Philadelphia, Cleveland, and all of Pennsylvania.

faq.question: Does Pittsburgh observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: Yes. Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania observes Daylight Saving Time. Clocks spring forward 1 hour on the second Sunday in March at 2:00 AM (EST → EDT) and fall back on the first Sunday in November. Pennsylvania follows the standard US DST schedule.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Pittsburgh and Chicago?
faq.answer: Pittsburgh (EST/EDT, Eastern Time) is always 1 hour ahead of Chicago (CST/CDT, Central Time). Both cities observe DST on the same schedule, keeping the gap constant year-round. When it is 9:00 AM in Chicago, it is 10:00 AM in Pittsburgh.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Pittsburgh and Los Angeles?
faq.answer: Pittsburgh (EST/EDT, Eastern Time) is always 3 hours ahead of Los Angeles (PST/PDT, Pacific Time). Both cities observe DST on the same schedule, keeping the gap constant year-round. When it is 9:00 AM in Los Angeles, it is 12:00 PM in Pittsburgh.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Pittsburgh?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Pittsburgh are 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM ET, Monday through Friday. Pittsburgh has transformed from a steel city into a technology and healthcare hub. Major employers include UPMC (University of Pittsburgh Medical Center), PNC Financial Services, Carnegie Mellon University, and University of Pittsburgh. Pittsburgh's tech sector is anchored by robotics and autonomous vehicle research. The Strip District and downtown Pittsburgh have active evening dining and entertainment scenes.
